title: Fortress Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation followed by malicious governance proposal on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls submit() on the oracle contract if it has been flagged as malicious
prevention.trigger: submit() -> malicious proposal in single tx

red_flags: Malicious proposal with high collateral factor
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls submit() on the oracle contract if it has been flagged as malicious
summary: Fortress Protocol was hacked due to a publicly callable oracle submit() function being manipulated to pass a malicious governance proposal, draining $3M worth of assets. A guard could have blocked any tx calling submit() if it led to a malicious proposal.
